{"parts":[{"content":"V wants me to:
1. Split the review file into two separate files - one for systemic/infra learnings, one for personal/domain learnings
2. Update the underlying triage process to classify learnings into these two categories
3. Route systemic learnings to SYSTEM_LEARNINGS.json
4. Route personal learnings to the N5 Brain/semantic memory

Let me:
1. First update the triage script to classify learnings into two categories
2. Generate two separate review files
3. Update the process script to handle both types (system → SYSTEM_LEARNINGS.json, personal → N5 Brain)

Let me check how the N5 Brain ingestion works first.","id":null,"signature":"","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_details":null,"part_kind":"thinking"},{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{"cmd": "# Check how N5 Brain ingestion works\nls -la N5/cognition/ | head -10\nfind N5/scripts -name \"*brain*\" -o -name \"*memory*\" -o -name \"*ingest*\" 2>/dev/null | head -10"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01T3ujYXr5RWS8NCg6UCZJuC","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"},{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{"cmd": "# Check the semantic memory / brain structure\ncat N5/cognition/README.md 2>/dev/null || head -50 N5/cognition/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -80"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01DSWjCn33Q81XE2Rxk221nr","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":66453,"cache_write_tokens":28899,"cache_read_tokens":37544,"output_tokens":366,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":28899,"cache_read_input_tokens":37544,"input_tokens":10,"output_tokens":366}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:12:38.891485Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"3700edcc-9785-4dee-9530-ad4a440293d9","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Operator"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01GCrpwYQboZUn7jrNC7nfe3","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"0610b4cc-02a3-4fc3-83c7-79b272917033","metadata":null}
